positive: A majestic and stylized howling wolf silhouette, rendered with dramatic, minimalist line art and intricate tribal-inspired patterns filling the wolf's form. The wolf is positioned centrally, facing the right, emerging from a stylized, geometric celestial moon phase backdrop and cosmic nebula swirl. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, charcoal grey, metallic gold, and stark white ink. The design must be highly adaptable for single-color screen printing on black apparel. High contrast, clean edges, vector-style graphic design, excellent composition, perfect for print merchandise.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, text, logos, signature, messy, grunge, dirty, gradient (unless celestial nebula), photorealistic, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
